nasb.text: Joel the son of Zichri was their overseer, and Judah the son of Hassenuah was second in command of the city.

esv.text: Joel the son of Zichri was their overseer; and Judah the son of Hassenuah was second over the city.

cnv.text: 細基利的兒子約珥是管理他們的官長；哈西努亞的兒子猶大是那城的副市長。

ccb.text: 细基利的儿子约珥是他们的监督，哈西努亚的儿子犹大是耶路撒冷的副官。
